guardrails: no prompt changes in this audit

summary.pipeline_conclusion: Brand3 narrative is assembled across collection, scoring, snapshot derivation, LLM overlays, and template rendering. The repetition is coming from both the prompts and the report structure, not from one single function.
summary.voice_conclusion: The current voice is stable but converges on consultant-style, score-led language. The report needs a more diagnostic, observation-first, tension-aware voice for sharper Brand3/FLOC* analysis.
summary.report_renderer_conclusion: The renderer assumes prose is already prepared and repeats the same summary logic across current-reading and synthesis tabs, which reinforces sameness.

what_happens: URL and brand input are validated and queued.
Context, web, Exa, social, and competitor inputs are collected or loaded from cache.
Raw inputs and evidence items are persisted into SQLite when available.
Data quality and partial-dimension status are decided before scoring.
Each dimension is turned into feature values with scores, confidence, sources, and raw_value payloads.
Many raw_value payloads already contain literal quotes, evidence snippets, and editorial judgment.
pipeline_map.prose_generation: indirect; feature raw_value fields feed later evidence extraction and report wording

what_happens: ScoringEngine computes per-dimension scores and a composite score.
SQLite stores scores, insights, rules, run summaries, and audits.
ScoringEngine.generate_summary() emits a separate run summary.
interpretation_happens: score caps and heuristic rule application

what_happens: SQLite snapshots are normalized into a renderable report dossier.
Evidence is extracted from feature raw_value fields and evidence_items.
Confidence, evidence summary, trust summary, and readiness are recomputed from the snapshot.
A deterministic synthesis fallback is always built.
Fallback text is used when the LLM is missing or fails.
The Jinja template renders score hero, trust state, evidence summary, current reading, synthesis, findings, sources, and footer.
The template renders both legacy_summary and synthesis_prose, which duplicates the narrative signal.

coherencia.intended_semantics: Consistency across touchpoints, including messaging, visual identity, tone, and cross-channel coherence.
coherencia.actual_emergent_behavior: Often becomes a self-vs-third-party comparison, with visual consistency as a weaker sub-signal.
ambiguity_sources: message and tone can dominate the reading
the dimension overlaps with differentiation when self-description diverges from third-party framing
opportunities_for_sharper_diagnosis: split into explicit visual consistency, message consistency, tone consistency, and channel coherence sub-questions
require concrete evidence for each sub-signal

presencia.intended_semantics: Discoverability and actual footprint across web, social, search, and directories.
presencia.actual_emergent_behavior: Often collapses into a live-web / findability check with a structural reach summary.
ambiguity_sources: a live website can still have weak reach
social and directory signals are often sparse
presence can collapse into existence rather than discoverability
opportunities_for_sharper_diagnosis: separate owned web presence from external discoverability
separate platform footprint from simple site availability

percepcion.intended_semantics: Public sentiment, awareness, and how people talk about the brand.
percepcion.actual_emergent_behavior: Often becomes mention-volume plus sentiment summary, sometimes reduced to niche-coverage language.
ambiguity_sources: low mention volume turns the dimension into a neutral placeholder
sentiment and controversy are easy to conflate
perception is sensitive to source quality and coverage depth
opportunities_for_sharper_diagnosis: separate awareness from sentiment from controversy from review quality
require explicit support for public-perception claims

diferenciacion.intended_semantics: Whether the brand says something ownable, distinct, and defensible instead of generic category language.
diferenciacion.actual_emergent_behavior: The most narrative-heavy dimension; it often generates the most consultant-like prose.
ambiguity_sources: positioning clarity, uniqueness, competitor distance, authenticity, and personality all point at the same strategic center
opportunities_for_sharper_diagnosis: split claims, ownable vocabulary, and competitor compression into distinct readings

vitalidad.intended_semantics: Whether the brand is active, publishing, and evolving.
vitalidad.actual_emergent_behavior: Often becomes a recency/cadence proxy plus a growth-vs-maintenance judgment.
ambiguity_sources: sparse dates create weak momentum inference
recent mentions can reflect attention rather than product activity
opportunities_for_sharper_diagnosis: separate recency, cadence, momentum, and lifecycle stage
avoid collapsing activity into a binary alive/dead story

repeated_sentence_structures: score statement + strongest dimension + weakest dimension + data quality
present / articulates + a positive strategic clause + a tension clause
the available sources point in the same direction
literary_filler: broad praise without a concrete signal attached
however / this creates a tension scaffolding without new evidence
one-big-insight paragraphs that flatten the evidence

perceptual_characteristics: describe what is visible on the surface
separate what the brand says from what others say
separate what is present from what is merely claimed

recommended_writing_model.editorial_target: Brand3/FLOC* should read like a precise diagnostic of a visual and strategic surface, not a general-purpose brand-strategy memo.

phrases_to_avoid: the available sources point in the same direction
narrative_styles_to_avoid: one big insight paragraphs that flatten the evidence
tone_patterns_to_avoid: too polished for the evidence level
structure_repetition_to_avoid: score / strongest / weakest / data quality in every summary paragraph
identical fallback paragraphs for every dimension
duplicated prose that says the same thing in both narrative tabs

low_risk_prompt_improvements: tighten openings so synthesis cannot drift back to score-first language
force one concrete evidence anchor per paragraph
ban the most generic praise and consultant phrases
require an explicit observation / implication split in findings
medium_risk_structural_changes: split report prose into observation, implication, tension, and recommendation-space layers
reduce duplicated prose between the current-reading and synthesis tabs
give each dimension a distinct diagnostic template
make the current-reading tab more compact and more technical
future_semantic_architecture_improvement: store structured narrative atoms instead of freeform prose
persist observation / implication / tension records separately
represent evidence linkage as first-class data
build reusable perceptual knowledge from recurring observation types
compose strategic synthesis from structured signals instead of one monolithic paragraph

top_repeated_clauses.phrase: The available sources point in the same direction.
Main tension: strong presence but still-limited differentiation versus alternatives.

notes: No dedicated persisted generated_texts_per_dimension artifact was found in the inspected outputs.
The report renderer does not invent new narrative; it formats the dossier it receives.
The fallback prose and the prompt prose both use similar analysis nouns, which is part of the voice convergence.
